free.title: Free Preview
free.description: Start watching instantly with a smooth premium playback experience.

output_02_04.title: Weekend Special
output_02_04.description: A featured weekend pick ready for streaming.

output_2min.title: Quick Preview
output_2min.description: A short title for a fast watch.

withlogo.title: Studio Preview
withlogo.description: A polished sample from the VigilSiddhi OTT collection.

asiacup.title: Asia Cup Finals
asiacup.description: India vs Pakistan action from a packed cricket stadium. Edge-of-your-seat live action.

blackmail.title: Blackmail
blackmail.description: Starring Irrfan Khan, Kirti Kulhari, Divya Dutta, Arunoday Singh and Omi Vaidya. A dark comedy thriller.

tmkoc.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
tmkoc.description: A light-hearted sitcom in the Gokuldham Society, where friends from different backgrounds navigate daily life with humor and wit.

tears_of_steel.title: Tears of Steel
tears_of_steel.description: A haunting sci-fi short where robots invade Amsterdam. Stunning VFX from the Blender Foundation open movie project.

big_buck_bunny.title: Big Buck Bunny
big_buck_bunny.description: A giant rabbit befriends woodland creatures — until three mischievous rodents push him too far. A Blender Foundation classic.

bbb_dark_truths.title: Big Buck Bunny — Dark Truths
bbb_dark_truths.description: A reimagining of the beloved animated classic with a darker, cinematic tone. Shaka demo edition with ABR.

sintel.title: Sintel
sintel.description: A lone heroine named Sintel embarks on a dangerous quest to find her baby dragon, Scales. A Blender Foundation fantasy epic.

elephant_dream.title: Elephant's Dream
elephant_dream.description: The world's first open movie — a surrealist journey through impossible mechanical worlds. By the Blender Foundation.

cosmos_laundromat.title: Cosmos Laundromat
cosmos_laundromat.description: A sheep on a remote island meets a mysterious stranger who grants him infinite lives. Award-winning Blender open short.

angel_one.title: Angel One
angel_one.description: A celestial sci-fi adventure with stunning ABR-adaptive streaming. Shaka Player official demo asset.

heliocentrism.title: Heliocentrism
heliocentrism.description: An immersive space documentary journey through our solar system. Shaka Player demo with multi-bitrate adaptive streaming.

multirate_dash.title: Multi-Rate ABR Baseline
multirate_dash.description: DASH-IF industry-standard multi-bitrate reference stream. Demonstrates adaptive bitrate switching across H.264 renditions.

hd_multireso.title: HD Reference Standard
hd_multireso.description: Qualcomm HD multi-resolution DASH reference stream for verifying ABR playback at high definition quality levels.

bitmovin_demo.title: Bitmovin Gold Standard
bitmovin_demo.description: Bitmovin's reference DASH stream — a benchmark for adaptive video delivery and player evaluation.
